evals.prompt: How do I reduce Swagger boilerplate in NestJS DTOs?
evals.expected_output: Enable the Nest CLI Swagger plugin in nest-cli.json under plugins: [@nestjs/swagger]. It auto-generates @ApiProperty from DTO class fields, reducing boilerplate by 50%.

evals.prompt: How do I document a generic paginated response in NestJS Swagger?
evals.expected_output: Use ApiExtraModels + getSchemaPath in a custom @ApiPaginatedResponse decorator. Register generic types so Swagger can resolve the T reference.

evals.prompt: How do I generate separate Swagger docs for public vs internal APIs in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Call SwaggerModule.createDocument with include: [PublicModule] for /api/docs and include: [AdminModule] for /admin/docs. Group with @ApiTags on controllers.

should_not_trigger: How do I write a NestJS guard?
How do I generate Swagger in Spring Boot?
How do I write JSDoc for a Go function?
